title: Overseas student visa application decision data :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Overseas student visa application decision data
Find student visa application outcomes for applicants who apply from outside New Zealand, broken down by applicant nationality.
Get the data on the outcome of fee paying and scholarship student visa applications.
The data covers applications from people who were outside New Zealand when they applied for:
- Fee Paying Student Visa
- Pathway Student Visa
- English Language Studies Student Visa
- MFAT-funded NZ Scholarship Student Visa
- Foreign Government Supported Student visa, and
- Exchange Student Visa.
- Overseas student visa application decisions for 2025 Data on fee paying and scholarship student visa application decisions. It covers the year 2025 and only those people outside New Zealand when they applied.

## Overseas student visa application decisions for 2025
Data on fee paying and scholarship student visa application decisions. It covers the year 2025 and only those people outside New Zealand when they applied.
- Overseas student visa application decisions for 2024 Data on fee paying and scholarship student visa application decisions. It covers the year 2024 and only those people outside New Zealand when they applied.
